creator: lisp_25689@163.com
text:
Created attachment 247432
games/moonlight-embedded: Update version 2.6.2

Update to version 2.6.2 and mv to mine github repo temprorily
Changes:
    1.Fixed connection issue streaming from some hosts running GeForce Experience or Sunshine v0.20 and earlier.
    2.Supplement the GPU decoding method in modesetting driver or wayland WM use 'x11_vaapi' platform.Tip: 
        If you need better GPU decoding, you can use moonligt-qt instead.
    3.Fixed keyboard no response when grabing keyboard.

First patch: update to version 2.6.2.
Second patch: mv to mine github repo temprorily for reducing patch files.

This is last version that I added my own code. The subsequent version changes will remain 
consistent with the upstream. If you have any other bugs, please contact me by email.

Please review! Thanks!
